setPassword.title: Set your password
setPassword.description: Welcome to the new Piedro Portal. Please set a password for your account to continue.
setPassword.too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setPassword.generic_error: Could not set the password. Please try again.
setPassword.invalid_token: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password. First time on the new portal? Use this to activate your account.
forgotPassword.sent_desc: If an account exists for that address, a password-reset link is on its way.

unassignedOrders.title: Unassigned orders
unassignedOrders.description: Migrated orders that could not be linked to a user, with the reason. They remain visible to company admins via their company.
unassignedOrders.empty: All orders are assigned to a user.

adminSettings.title: Settings
adminSettings.description: Configure notification emails. These override the server environment variables.
adminSettings.order_notify_help: Where new submitted orders are emailed. Multiple addresses allowed, separated by commas.
adminSettings.admin_notify_help: Where new user sign-ups are emailed. Multiple addresses allowed, separated by commas.
adminSettings.email_from_help: Must be a Piedro-owned, Resend-verified address, e.g. Piedro Portal <noreply@piedro.com>.
adminSettings.notify_locale_help: Language of the internal Piedro notification emails. Client confirmations always use the order's language.
adminSettings.dispatch_show_all: Show the dispatch counter to all users (otherwise staff/admin only)
adminSettings.dispatch_help: Working days added to the order date, skipping weekends, Portuguese holidays and factory closures.
adminSettings.chat_notify_help: Where assistant consent + flagged-answer alerts are emailed. Falls back to the new-user address. Commas allowed.
adminSettings.contact_help: Shown to clients by the assistant when they need to reach Piedro. First address is used. Never invented.
adminSettings.broadcast_reply_help: Where replies to mass email campaigns are delivered. Usually the public contact address.
adminSettings.dpo_help: Privacy/DPO contact shown on the Privacy & Legal pages. First address is used.

emails.client_intro: Thank you. Your order has been submitted to Piedro. A copy is attached for your records.
emails.new_user_note: This user has no company yet. Assign the correct account.
emails.reset_body: Click the button below to set your password. This link expires in 2 hours and can be used only once. If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.

adminTexts.title: Set-password & reset email texts
adminTexts.description: Customize the set-password page and the password-reset email, per language. Leave a field blank to use the default. Use "Propose from English" to auto-translate, then review.
adminTexts.revert_hint: An empty field falls back to the built-in default for that language.

grandOpening.title: Grand Opening
grandOpening.intro: The one-time cut-over from the test phase to production. Follow the plan below, pop the cork, and from that moment the portal is live — Dataverse will never be consulted again unless an inconsistency is detected.
grandOpening.count_portal_orders: Test orders created in the portal (will be deleted)
grandOpening.step_1: Delete every order created in the portal during the test phase — configured and stock orders, including their PDFs. Migrated Dataverse orders are never touched.
grandOpening.step_2: Delete the test users in User Management. Deletion is blocked for any user who has orders, so real accounts are safe.
grandOpening.step_3: Run the final Dataverse import locally, in this order: import-accounts → import-contacts → import-dataverse-orders → backfill-order-users (--contact-field=_cr56f_user_value) → backfill --verify.
grandOpening.step_4: Validate: order counts match Dataverse, statuses are fresh, and the backfill verification passes.
grandOpening.step_5: Open the bottle. 🍾 The portal is now the single source of truth.
grandOpening.users_hint: Test users are removed one by one, safely, in
grandOpening.super_only: Execution is reserved for the super admin. You can review the plan and the counts, but only the super admin can run the deletion.
grandOpening.danger_text: This permanently deletes {total} test order(s) and their PDFs. Type {word} to confirm.
grandOpening.done: Done! {orders} portal order(s), {stock} stock order(s) and {pdfs} PDF(s) deleted. Time for champagne.
grandOpening.live_body: It happened right on the stroke of midnight, 15 June 2026, and everything went exactly according to plan. The portal is now the single source of truth.
grandOpening.live_moment: The real moment of truth arrives in a few hours, when the clients walk in. It's going to work out. Good luck — and success! 🍾

filters.searchHint: Search by model number. Use * as a wildcard: 2* = starts with 2, *K = ends with K.

order.title: New Order
order.order_submitted_email_error: Order submitted. PDF generated. Email error:

auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.register_confirm_sent: We sent a confirmation link to
auth.register_click_link: Open the email and click the confirmation link to activate your account.
auth.email_tips_address: Check that the email address you entered is correct and that you are looking at the inbox of that account.
auth.email_tips_junk: Check your junk/spam folder — unfortunately we don't have full control over the filters that may mark our emails as untrusted.
auth.email_tips_trusted: If you find our email in junk, please mark the sender as trusted and then click the confirmation link.
auth.forgot_password: Forgot your password or need a new one?
auth.confirm_body: Click the button below to activate your Piedro Portal account.
auth.confirm_failed_body: This confirmation link is no longer valid. Please register again or request a new link.
auth.resend_sent: If an account exists for this email, a new confirmation link has been sent. Check your inbox (and junk folder).
auth.resend_rate_limited: Please wait a minute before requesting another email.
auth.pending_company_desc: Your account is being reviewed by Piedro International. You will receive an email when your access to orders is activated.
auth.migrated_welcome_body: For security reasons we could not carry over the password you used on the old portal. We will email you a link to a secure area where you can set your new password and enjoy everything new we have built. We hope you like it — your feedback is very welcome and every detail will be considered and answered. With thanks, the Piedro International team.
auth.migrated_link_sent: We sent a secure link to {email}. Open the email to set your new password.

footer.cookie_notice: We use only essential cookies to keep you signed in.

orders.title: Orders
orders.search_hint: Use * as a wildcard: 2* = starts with 2, *K = ends with K.
orders.delete_confirm: Delete this draft order? This cannot be undone.

users.title: User Management

products.title: Products
products.search_hint: Use * as a wildcard: 2* = starts with 2, *K = ends with K.
products.exclusive_hint: Applies to the whole model (all colours). Only the chosen company's users can see and order it.
products.save_first_hint: Save first, then add images on the edit screen.
products.untouched_hint: Products not in the sheet are left untouched.
products.images_intro: Pick a folder (the whole tree is scanned) or individual files. Names are normalised to colour_id.NN.png. Every image is auto-processed on upload: background removed (plain white only), trimmed and re-centred at the same scale, converted to PNG.
products.anom_folder_mismatch: Folder {folder} contains images named for a different model ({ids}) — excluded from upload
products.excluded_mismatch_hint: Filename points to a different model than folder {folder}
products.anom_duplicate_target: {count} files map to the same target {target} — only the last upload is kept
products.anom_unmatched: No product found for {id} ({count} file(s) skipped)
products.view_gallery_hint: Open the public product page to validate imported data and images
products.slots_hint: Slot 1 is the main image (sets picture_name). Every image is auto-processed: background removed (plain white only), trimmed and re-centred at the same scale, converted to PNG.
products.rejected_warning: {n} model(s) skipped — no construction. Every model must have at least one construction; fix the sheet and re-import.
products.sample_discrepancies: Discrepancies — sheet disagrees with the portal
products.validate_hint: Only new models are created. Existing models are validated, not changed — the portal is the source of truth.
products.import_exclude_hint: Untick any model you do not want to import.
products.out_excluded_note: {n} model(s) marked OUT were pre-excluded — tick to import anyway.
products.stock_flag_note: {n} existing model(s) will be flagged as stock.
products.accept_orphans: Also upload {count} image(s) that follow the naming convention but have no product yet — they will link automatically once the product is created or imported.
products.toggle_new_hint: Toggle the NEW badge in the gallery

branches.title: Branch offices
branches.field_notify_hint: This branch receives a copy of each order for its models, in this language. Leave the email blank for none.
branches.mode_full_hint: sees the whole catalogue except the selected models
branches.confirm_delete: Delete this branch? Staff will be detached.
branches.models_exclude_hint: Selected models are hidden from this branch
branches.models_include_hint: This branch sees only the selected models
branches.no_staff: No staff assigned to this branch yet.
branches.add_staff_placeholder: Add a user to this branch…
branches.staff_role_hint: Set a user’s role to “Branch staff” in Users for scoping to take effect.

companies.title: Companies
companies.notify_hint: Extra Cc/Bcc added to every order confirmation for this customer (comma-separated).
companies.members_hint: Users belonging to this company. Tick "Admin" to let a user manage all of the company's orders.
companies.search_placeholder: Search by company, user name or email…
companies.reconcile_hint: Each sigla below comes from a product's exclusive field. Assign it to a company by setting that company's exclusive label.
companies.no_siglas: No exclusive siglas found in the catalogue.
companies.label_hint: The uppercase sigla that marks a model as exclusive to this company. Must be unique across companies.
companies.set_label_first: Set an exclusive label first, then assign models to it.
companies.add_hint: Only models not exclusive to another company are listed. Adding makes the model exclusive to this company (all colours).

order.title: Gallery order
order.subtitle: Drag a model to reposition it, or tick several and click an insertion point to move them together.
order.drag_hint: Drag a model to reorder, or tick several to move them together.

stock.intro: Set the on-hand quantity per size for stock models. Available to customers = on hand − reserved by open orders.
stock.searchHint: Use * as a wildcard: 2* = starts with 2, *K = ends with K.
stock.shiftHint: Click to select · Shift+click selects a range

adminTranslations.title: Translations
adminTranslations.description: Edit the translations for filter values and colours shown across the portal.
adminTranslations.hint: Empty cells fall back to the English value. Changes apply immediately after saving.
adminTranslations.recompose_hint: Rebuild basic-colour translations from the word dictionary (skips manually edited ones).
adminTranslations.colour_hint: Edit the word dictionary, then Recompose to regenerate the colour list. Manually edited colours are marked and never overwritten.

factoryCalendar.title: Factory closure calendar
factoryCalendar.description: Mark days the factory does not work. Weekends and Portuguese holidays are automatic; orders not yet delivered are recalculated.
factoryCalendar.pending_recompute: Closure changes saved. Reprocess to update the expected dispatch dates of existing orders (also done automatically when you leave this page).

hero.title: Welcome to the new Piedro Portal!
body: This portal is exclusively available to our business partners.
We've streamlined the ordering process from A to Z, so you order faster, buy smarter and save valuable time.
Great to have you here! Discover everything our renewed portal has in store for you.

women.title: Women's shoes
women.body: Your feet deserve the best care. Our orthopaedic women's shoes offer optimal support and comfort, without compromising on a polished look.

men.title: Men's shoes
men.body: Step into the day with confidence. Our orthopaedic men's shoes provide the support and stability your feet need, for an active day from morning to evening.

kids.title: Children's shoes
kids.body: Healthy foot development starts with the right shoe. Our orthopaedic children's shoes support growing feet the right way, without compromising on style.

orthosoft.title: New at Piedro!
body: We continuously expand our range with the very best orthopaedic shoes, from fresh seasonal models to innovative new lines.
We proudly present the new Piedro Ortho Soft Collection, specially developed for the sensitive and diabetic foot. A perfect blend of comfort, care and style, with the support you can rely on.
orthosoft.cta: View the Piedro Ortho Soft Collection →

portal.title: New portal, even more convenience
portal.intro: Alongside our latest collections, we've completely renewed our portal. From now on you benefit from a range of new features that make purchasing even easier:
features: More user-friendly ordering — Order faster and more intuitively, with fewer clicks to your order.
New dashboard — A clear overview of your orders in one place.
Chat function — Use our chat for questions, advice or support.
Quick reorder — Reorder previously ordered items with just one click.
portal.note: Your account details and order history have been fully migrated — you can get started right away.

evo.title: New in stock: Piedro EVO Shoes & Boots
evo.intro: Good news! Piedro EVO shoes and boots are now available directly from stock and easy to order through our portal!
evo.sub: The Piedro EVO collection is specially designed with extra comfort and functionality in mind:
features: Wider and deeper lasts, for a perfect fit in combination with EVOs.
High-quality materials, for extra durability and stability.
Immediately available — in stock and ready to order through our portal.
evo.cta: Order the Piedro EVO collection now →

catalogues_card.title: Our catalogues
catalogues_card.body: Leaf through the full Piedro collection — just like the printed book.

hero.title: Welcome to the Piedro Portal!
hero.body: The exclusive platform for our business partners. Log in for instant access to our full range of quality footwear, up-to-date stock information and a streamlined ordering process. Designed to make your purchasing faster, smarter and more efficient.

women.title: Women
women.body: Style and comfort for every day. Designed to combine quality and elegance.

men.title: Men
men.body: Durable quality and contemporary design for the modern professional.

kids.title: Children
kids.body: Reliable fit and protection, step by step through every stage of development.

new.title: New in our collection
new.body: Our range is refreshed every two months with new models and additions to the collection. So you always have access to the latest products and your offering stays current. View the latest additions here.

updates.title: Portal updates
updates.body: We continuously optimise the portal to make your ordering process as smooth as possible. New features, improved navigation and technical updates are rolled out regularly, so you can always count on a user-friendly and efficient environment. Stay up to date with the latest improvements here.

custom.title: Customisable models
custom.body: Our shoes can be fully tailored to your clients' wishes, from material choice to special finishes.

catalogs.title: Our catalogues
catalogs.body: We have extensive catalogues, so you can always easily browse and select from the full range.

catalogues.title: Our catalogues
catalogues.subtitle: Leaf through the full Piedro collection — just like the printed book.

aanpasbare-modellen.title: Customisable models
aanpasbare-modellen.subtitle: Smart materials, modular design and responsive support come together in a shoe that moves with you. Designed for those who want to combine comfort, functionality and style without compromise.
body: These customisable shoes use temperature- and pressure-sensitive materials that mould to the anatomy of your foot throughout the day. The result is a personal fit that offers both stability and flexibility, whatever the activity. The midsole responds to movement and load, so you automatically get the right cushioning and support as you switch between walking, standing and sport.

The modular design makes it easy to replace or upgrade individual components — such as the insole, panels or outer layer. This not only increases the product’s durability, but also makes it scalable for different user needs. A single model can serve multiple scenarios, from everyday wear to more intensive movement.

The system also leaves room for personalisation. Interchangeable elements let you quickly adapt the shoe’s visual identity without affecting its technical performance. This creates a product that not only evolves functionally, but also grows with your style and preferences.

Finally, these customisable shoes show how innovation and ease of use can come together in one product. By cleverly combining technology and design, they offer a solution that matches the dynamics of modern users — and is ready for the future of everyday comfort.

stock.title: Stock
stock.heading: Order directly from stock
stock.intro: These models are available directly from stock. Select the sizes and quantities you need and we will take care of fast delivery.
stock.pending: Your account is awaiting approval. You cannot place orders yet.
stock.noProducts: There are no stock products available right now.
stock.clickToSelect: Click a model to add it to your order; click again to remove it.
stock.loginHint: After logging in you can select models and place a stock order.
stock.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# model selected} other {# models selected}}
stock.commentsPlaceholder: Anything we should know about this order?
stock.emptyCart: Select at least one pair to order.

adminEmail.title: Email broadcast
adminEmail.subtitle: Compose an email and send it to one user, a company, or everyone with a company. Bulk sends are throttled automatically.
adminEmail.subject: Subject
adminEmail.body_hint: Format with the toolbar; paste text, logos and photos directly (images are uploaded automatically). Use '{{name}}' to insert the recipient’s name.
adminEmail.footer_preview: Footer (added automatically, in the recipient’s language)
adminEmail.footer_text: You are receiving this email because you have a Piedro Portal account.
adminEmail.throttle_note: Bulk sends go out in small paced batches (about 80 emails per 5 minutes) to protect deliverability.
adminEmail.test_sent: Test email sent to your address.
adminEmail.signature: Signature (added to every broadcast — paste your logo here)
adminEmail.signature_hint: Paste or write the signature: name, logo, contacts…
adminEmail.recip_hint: Added to every email this campaign sends. Bulk sends put each recipient in Bcc — the To field shows the sender address unless you set one here. Internal users (admins/staff) are excluded from bulk audiences.
adminEmail.translations_hint: Recipients receive the version matching their portal language; languages without a translation get the original. Review and edit each tab before sending.

chatConsent.title: Before using the assistant
chatConsent.intro: This chat helps you with questions about how the portal works and lets you look up your own data stored here.
chatConsent.log: For internal control, quality and auditing, we keep a record of the message flow (in and out).
chatConsent.advise: Please do not include patients’ personal data in your conversations — use references or order numbers instead.
chatConsent.breach: Attempts to bypass the portal’s security or to access data that is not yours are a serious breach and may lead to your account being blocked.
chatConsent.emailNote: By continuing you accept these terms. A confirmation email is sent to you and to the portal administrator.
chatConsent.declined: No problem — you can accept any time to use the assistant.

chatFeedback.thanks: Thanks — sent to our team for review.
chatFeedback.rateLimited: You are sending messages too quickly. Please wait a moment.

welcome.title: Welcome, {name}
welcome.lead: This is your renewed Piedro ordering portal — faster, multilingual, and always one step ahead.
welcome.h_gallery_d: Explore the full catalogue and configure orders per foot.
welcome.h_orders_d: Track status, expected dispatch, and repeat past orders in one click.
welcome.h_stock_d: Order in-stock models immediately, no configuration.
welcome.h_assistant_d: Questions about the portal or your orders? Just ask, in your language.

adminContacts.title: Contact details
adminContacts.description: Public contact information shown in the footer and used by the assistant and legal pages. Everything here is managed in the back-office — nothing is hardcoded.
adminContacts.contact_email_help: Shown by the assistant and on the Legal page. Used when clients need to reach Piedro.
adminContacts.dpo_email_help: Shown on the Privacy and Legal pages for data-protection requests.
adminContacts.social_help: Paste the full URL. Only filled networks appear in the footer.
adminContacts.no_locations: No locations yet. Add an office, factory or warehouse.
